metadata.title: ChillTour - Plan Your Perfect Trip
metadata.description: Create personalized travel itineraries with AI-powered trip planning

validation.destinationMaxLength: Destination must be at most 100 characters
validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be on or after start date
validation.titleMaxLength: Title must be at most 100 characters
validation.activityTitleMaxLength: Activity title must be at most 100 characters
validation.timeInvalidFormat: Time must be in HH:MM format
validation.durationMin: Duration must be at least 1 minute
validation.durationMax: Duration must be at most 480 minutes
validation.noteMaxLength: Note must be at most 500 characters

hero.subtitle: Plan your dream trip in seconds.

form.vibePlaceholder: Budget-friendly foodie tour, hiking spots, vintage shopping...
form.createError: Failed to create itinerary. Please try again.

auth.signInError: Failed to sign in. Please try again.
auth.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

itineraries.title: My Itineraries
itineraries.subtitle: Manage and view all your travel plans
itineraries.loadErrorMessage: Unable to load your itineraries. Please try again later.

empty.title: You haven't created any itineraries yet
empty.description: Start planning your next trip and create your first itinerary

editDialog.title: Edit Activity
editDialog.description: Make changes to your activity here. Click save when you're done.
editDialog.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The activity will be permanently removed from your itinerary.
editDialog.confirmDeleteNote: Please confirm you want to permanently delete this activity.

addDialog.title: Add Activity
addDialog.description: Add a new activity to your itinerary. Click save when you're done.

editMetadataDialog.title: Edit Trip Details
editMetadataDialog.description: Modify your trip metadata here. Click save when you're done.
editMetadataDialog.shrinkHint: Shortening will remove the last {count} day(s)
editMetadataDialog.confirmShrinkDescription: You are about to remove {count} day(s). All activities on those days will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
editMetadataDialog.confirmShrinkNote: Please confirm you understand this action will permanently delete all activities for the days listed above.
editMetadataDialog.confirmDeleteItineraryDescription: This action cannot be undone. All activities and metadata will be permanently removed.
editMetadataDialog.confirmDeleteItineraryNote: Please confirm you want to permanently delete this itinerary.

chat.title: Chat
chat.deleteConfirm: Delete all chat history for this itinerary?
chat.emptyDescription: Ask me to modify your itinerary, suggest activities, or answer questions about your trip.
chat.placeholder: Ask me anything about your trip...
chat.sendHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
chat.error: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
